name: harness-grok-build
description: Grok Build CLI harness — spawns the local `grok` (xAI Grok Build) binary. Two routes (clear binary vs sdk parallel to claude-binary / claude-sdk): label "grok" (default headless -p streaming-json + resume + rich events) and "grok-acp" (ACP `grok agent stdio` long-lived agent protocol). Both are switchable via HarnessInstance (or per-grok-instance advanced config). The Go core (grokbuild + grok-acp packages) owns the actual work; this is the registration shim only.
